name: Kurona Yasuhisa
description:
Kurona Yasuhisa is an artificial one-eyed ghoul who impeded Ken Kaneki's pursuit of Madam A alongside her twin sister Nashiro.

~!After being abandoned by Akihiro Kanou, she vanished until her appearance during the Rushima Landing Operation. She merged with her sister and became known to the CCG as Floppy.!~
